=== Commons fallback: 3 feast(s) ===
These refs are covered by the category commons, not feast-specific propers.
Add to data/audit-ok.txt to acknowledge and suppress.

  [base]
  [1cl] St. George (st-george)
    commons: benedictus-antiphon, magnificat-antiphon

=== Flat indexed psalm antiphons: 0 proper, 0 common ===

=== Translation review: 4 mixed-register, 3 modern-pronoun collect(s) ===
These entries are high-signal candidates for translation normalization.
Mixed-register entries contain both thou/thee/thy and you/your language in the same text.

  [mixed-register]
    proper/advent-sunday-2/magnificat-antiphon
    proper/easter-sunday-4/benedictus-antiphon
    proper/ss-philip-james/psalm-antiphon-3
    proper/trinity-sunday/collect

  [modern-pronoun collects]
    proper/all-souls/collect
    proper/quinquagesima/collect
    proper/trinity-sunday/collect

  feast-id *                   (suppress all warnings for this feast)
  feast-id ref1 ref2 ...        (suppress specific refs only)
